questions.question: What is the primary difference between a one-dimensional array and a two-dimensional array in programming?
questions.hint: Defines the characteristics of each type of array

questions.question: Write a C program to initialize a 2D array with values from a one-dimensional array. Explain how the values are assigned to the 2D array.
questions.hint: Illustrates the concept of initializing a 2D array from a 1D array

questions.question: What is the purpose of the `#include` directive in C programming to access a header file that declares the `stdio.h` library functions?
questions.hint: Explains the role of `#include` in accessing external libraries
